entries.title: Erin Brockovich takes aim at data center secrecy
entries.description: Environmental activist Erin Brockovich has a new mission.

entries.title: Making sense of the debate over AI psychosis
entries.description: On the latest episode of Equity, we debate whether tech CEOs are "uniquely prone to AI psychosis."

entries.title: SoftBank says it will invest up to €75B to build French data centers
entries.description: The goal, the firm said, is to develop and operate up to 5 gigawatts of additional data center capacity.

entries.title: ‘What a joke’: GitHub Copilot’s new token-based billing spurs consternation among devs
entries.description: The golden age of Microsoft's GitHub Copilot appears to be at an end.

entries.title: Meta is reportedly developing an AI pendant
entries.description: Meta seems to be making big bets on AI-powered hardware.

entries.title: I put Google’s 24/7 AI assistant Gemini Spark to work, and it’s actually pretty useful
entries.description: Gemini Spark helps automate everyday tasks, from inbox summaries to local event planning, but it’s unclear why Google made it a separate product.

entries.title: As the browser wars heat up, here are the hottest alternatives to Chrome and Safari in 2026
entries.description: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

entries.title: Nvidia chases $200B CPU market with AI agent PCs from Microsoft, Dell, and HP
entries.description: If Nvidia has cracked a way to bring AI agents easily, safely, and usefully to the masses, it could — and should — be big.

entries.title: Florida sues OpenAI, Sam Altman, in first-of-its-kind lawsuit over violent incidents
entries.description: The lawsuit partially revolves around a shooting at Florida State University last year, and ChatGPT's alleged role in the incident.

entries.title: Water access is now a risk factor in SpaceX’s IPO
entries.description: The company says it needs "significant" water resources to cool its data centers, and that access to abundant, affordable water is a challenge.

entries.title: Anthropic files to go public
entries.description: Anthropic, now an AI powerhouse that has landed top-tier enterprise customers, was once considered an underdog in the emerging world of large language models.

entries.title: DuckDuckGo makes its ‘no-AI’ search engine easier to access as its traffic booms
entries.description: Alternative search engine DuckDuckGo launches 'no AI' web extensions for Chrome and Firefox users.

entries.title: Coders are refusing to work without AI — and that could come back to bite them
entries.description: While AI is helping coders produce code faster, it may not be producing better code, researchers warn. And that could cause problems down the road for them.

entries.title: So you’ve heard these AI terms and nodded along; let’s fix that
entries.description: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.

entries.title: Cognition’s Scott Wu says AI coding agents shouldn’t replace humans
entries.description: Cognition makes Devin, the first and arguably most successful AI coding agent. But famed coder Wu says it isn't designed to supplant human programmers.
